headline: Corning (GLW) Stock After 97% Rally And Recent Pullback Is The Price Still Reasonable
summary: Corning's stock has caught plenty of attention, and if you are wondering whether the recent price puts it above or below a reasonable value, this breakdown is aimed squarely at that question. After a strong run with the stock up 97.6% year to date and 256.8% over the past year, the recent pullback of 4.4% over the past week and 6.6% over the past month may have some investors reassessing both the upside and the risks. Recent coverage has focused on Corning's role in key technology supply...

headline: Corning, IBD Stock Of The Day, Boosted By AI Data Center Play
summary: Corning stock has gained over 100% in 2026 as Wall Street focuses on the firm's booming optical communications business for AI data centers.

headline: 1 Industrials Stock on Our Watchlist and 2 We Brush Off
summary: Whether you see them or not, industrials businesses play a crucial part in our daily activities. They are also bound to benefit from a friendlier regulatory environment with the Trump administration, and this excitement has led to a six-month gain of 17.8% for the sector - higher than the S&P 500’s 8.4% return.

headline: Jim Cramer Recommends Corning Over Applied Optoelectronics
summary: Applied Optoelectronics, Inc. (NASDAQ:AAOI) was among the stocks Jim Cramer highlighted during Mad Money, as he noted the rotation into defensive sectors. A caller asked for Cramer’s thoughts on the company and expressed interest in starting a position in the stock. He replied: No, no. I want you to, if you’re going to go that […]
